description: Style Note Nothing matters whether it is a Monday morning or a Friday afternoon when it comes to comfort taking the front seat. These trousers from indian terrain diminish all your worries as you glide in and out of work. Inspired by American sportswear, your appearance will always be one to contend with, so go ahead and create your own niche with comfort. Product Details Beige trousers that have a flat front, comfortable waistband with loops, two insert pockets on either sides, small coin pocket below the waistband on the right, two welt pockets with buttoned closures at the back, brand badge above the back pocket on the right with a buttoned and zipped closure on the front with extendible hems Material and Care100% cotton Machine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim Fit low rise The model (height:6' and waist: 32") is wearing a size 32
